title: Inclusive Free the End
description: A datapack that grants "Free the End" to all players that contributed to the dragon fight
body:
**Have you ever wished that fighting the dragon gave everyone the credit they deserve?  In vanilla, it only gives the advancement "Free the End" to the person who dealt the final blow.  This datapack changes that, granting it to everyone who contributed to the fight!**

_Contribution:  Grants Free the End to all players who damaged the dragon during the fight_

_Proximity: Grants Free the End to all players on the central end island when the dragon is killed_

**Feel free to modify this datapack for personal use, but please do not publish any identical or modified versions without my consent.**
